generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf# // Return code: 1 | Stderr:
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures rotational speed of vehicle wheels",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedData
]
instance AccelerometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures acceleration forces acting on the vehicle chassis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationData
]
instance StructuralLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures structural loads on key components",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadData
]
instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]
instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerometerSensor
]
instance LoadData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralLoadSensor
]
instance RawWheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw time-series data from wheel speed sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]
instance RawAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw acceleration data from vehicle chassis sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance RawLoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw structural load measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model of vehicle structural dimensions from CAD software",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance DifferentialEquationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model representing dynamic behavior using differential equations",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]
instance CADSoftware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design software used for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]
instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based simulation engine for dynamic analysis",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]
instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for parameter estimation using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]
instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in system behavior",
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]
instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system health state",
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]
instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]
instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System for monitoring safety and optimality checks",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and operational optimality",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight, SafetyInterventionAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]
instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of physical twin behavior using calibrated models",
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformancePredictionInsight
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms for identifying system anomalies",
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]
instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for system health assessment",
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthStatusInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services for performance enhancement",
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]
instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detects safety-critical deviations from operational parameters"
]
instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates deviations from optimal operational conditions"
]
instance PerformancePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicts future system performance based on current conditions"
]
instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies anomalies in system behavior based on sensor data and model predictions"
]
instance HealthStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assesses system health through state estimation of components"
]
instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides recommendations for optimizing system performance based on simulation results"
]
instance SafetyInterventionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers automated or manual intervention in response to safety violations",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of vehicle speed to maintain safe operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary rotating component of the automotive vehicle"
]
instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame supporting the vehicle's components"
]
instance StructuralElements : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Key structural components such as beams and supports in the vehicle"
]
instance TransportationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Wheels, Chassis, StructuralElements
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to update cyber-physical system (CPS) and environmental model parameters using sensor-derived data, monitoring components to assess operational safety and optimality, and human or algorithmic intervention mechanisms for corrective actions upon violation detection, as described in Document 1 Figure 1."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a Raspberry Pi single-board computer for local control and data processing of the incubator system."
]
